Odin.name: Odin
Odin.entrance: appears as an old man in a cloak, one eye gleaming, two ravens on his shoulders
return_entrance: returns as a wanderer at the gate, leaning on a staff that was not a staff before
appears again, this time with a single raven — the other is elsewhere, watching something you cannot see

arrival: hangs from the World Tree for nine nights, then steps down and walks toward you
sits by the fire without asking, his one eye reflecting flames that are not there
speaks in riddles that feel like memories you haven't had yet

Frigg.name: Frigg
Frigg.entrance: arrives in silence, mistletoe in her hair, knowing everything and saying nothing

arrival: weaves at a loom that was not there a moment ago, the threads shimmering with futures
stands at the window watching the sea, having foreseen this conversation since before the keep was built
touches the stones of the hall and nods — she asked them to protect you, long ago

Thor.name: Thor
Thor.entrance: arrives in a chariot of goats, hammer crackling, the storm following him like a loyal dog

arrival: crashes through the roof — literally — and laughs at the damage
strides in from the rain, dripping, grinning, demanding mead
sets Mjolnir on the table. The table groans. He doesn't notice.

Loki.name: Loki
Loki.entrance: is already in the room when you turn around, eating your bread, wearing your face wrong

arrival: appears as a fly, then a fish, then a horse, then himself — laughing at your confusion
tells you three lies and one truth. You will spend the rest of the night deciding which is which.
offers you a gift wrapped in shadow. It is exactly what you need. It is exactly what will destroy you.

Freyja.name: Freyja
Freyja.entrance: arrives in a chariot drawn by cats, her falcon cloak shimmering with unshed tears and unspent desire

arrival: walks through the hall and the torches burn brighter, the stones grow warmer, the dead in the walls stir
offers you a feather from her cloak. It will take you anywhere. It will cost you something you love.
sits beside you and says nothing. Her presence is enough. It is always enough.

Heimdall.name: Heimdall
Heimdall.entrance: stands at the gate, having walked here from Bifrost, his eyes reflecting every color at once

arrival: blows the Gjallarhorn — once, soft. The note hangs in the air for minutes. 'A warning,' he says. 'Or a greeting. You decide.'
looks at you and sees everything you have done in this keep. He nods slowly. 'You have been witnessed.'
stands guard at your door without being asked. Nothing will enter while he stands there.

Hel.name: Hel
Hel.entrance: rises through the floor, half beautiful, half bone, her voice the sound of graves opening

arrival: stands in the center of the hall, one side of her face smiling, the other not
offers you a seat at her table. 'It is not as far as you think. None of you are as far as you think.'
touches the names carved in the stone. 'I know these ones. They are well. They asked about you.'

Baldr.name: Baldr
Baldr.entrance: arrives with light that does not cast shadows, his beauty almost unbearable, his kindness more so

arrival: steps through the door and everything that was broken in the room is whole again
smiles at you. You believe, for the first time in years, that things might be alright.
touches the chest where the names are kept. 'They are not forgotten,' he says. 'That is all anyone wants. To not be forgotten.'

Tyr.name: Tyr
Tyr.entrance: arrives with one hand empty, the other missing, his word still good after all these centuries

arrival: offers you his remaining hand. 'An oath,' he says. 'I keep those.'
looks at the compact and nods. 'I know what it costs to put your hand in the wolf's mouth. You did well.'
stands beside you facing whatever comes. He does not speak. He does not need to.

Skadi.name: Skadi
Skadi.entrance: arrives on skis made of frozen moonlight, bow in hand, the temperature dropping as she enters

arrival: stands in the hall and frost spreads from her feet across the stones. 'I like this place,' she says. 'It is cold. Cold is honest.'
offers you a bow made of yew and winter. 'Hunt with me. The prey is worthy.'
looks at the sea cliffs and smiles. 'My father would have loved this place. He was a giant. Everything was smaller than him.'

Bragi.name: Bragi
Bragi.entrance: arrives with a harp and a voice that makes the stones weep, runes carved on his tongue

arrival: sits by the fire and begins to play. The song is about you. You have never heard it before. It is true.
offers to compose a saga of your six visitations. 'It will be sung for a thousand years. Or forgotten by morning. Either is a gift.'
listens to your story before he tells his own. 'A skald who does not listen is no skald at all.'
